text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, just after training with Maruzensky, it
starts to rain.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer, are you free now?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer, are you free now?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I was driving in the rain, I thought
about how fun it could be to run in weather like
that.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The wind must feel so different when you can
barely see and water is splashing all around.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
This could make for some tubular training! It'd be
a bummer to end it here! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it'll feel great to blaze through the pouring
rain! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It should feel just like a morning shower! Well,
maybe it's closer to an evening shower...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I've still got energy to burn. I'm only just starting
to show my true colors!
choice_data_list: We should call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's what I'm talking about! Time to light this
fuse!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Haha! Even the sky seems to be happy!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Let's go—into a world where the wind cuts
through even the smallest of raindrops!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thus, our training carries on into the pouring rain.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, phooey. It's such a great opportunity...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I guess that's just how it is... It's important to
take care of your health, after all.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If you caught a cold because of me, I would feel
terrible.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If you caught a cold because of me, I would feel
terrible.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, let me take you for a drive in the rain
instead! Just the two of us! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find the rainy drive a little stressful, but
Maruzensky seems to really enjoy it.
